texto: Michael Powell knows what I am going to say even before I say it — maybe even before I have thought it – and that is very rare. You are lucky if you meet someone like that once in your life.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Emeric Pressburger: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Michael Powell knows what I am going to say even before I say it — maybe even before I have thoug…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, amizade, before pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
